label: Federated & privacy-preserving learning

node.label: Federated & privacy-preserving learning
node.definition: Training is coordinated across separated data holders while limiting raw-data movement or information leakage.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Federated & privacy-preserving learning is modeled as depending on Distributed systems & networking, Datasets, sampling & splits and feeding downstream nodes such as Privacy, governance, licensing & audit.
examples: atlas downstream link to Privacy, governance, licensing & audit
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Datasets, sampling & splits.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Federated & privacy-preserving learning has a `uses` dependency on Distributed systems & networking because Distributed systems & networking is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Federated & privacy-preserving learning has a `uses` dependency on Datasets, sampling & splits because Datasets, sampling & splits is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Federated & privacy-preserving learning has a `trained_under` dependency on Supervised learning with `common` strength.
